The '''Royale Macheteros''' were the elite guard of the [[Kashi Mer Dynasty|Kashi Mer]] monarchy. They practiced a sword fighting style similar to [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]].<ref name="The Dark Forces Saga, Part 4" /> The [[Parang/Legends|parang]] was reminiscent of the weapons carried by the Royale Macheteros.<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>
